name: fixed_g900_body
source_artifact: G900 observatory body and existing transport registries
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may read the fixed G900 body/register state as its static substrate.
forbidden_use: May not mutate the G900 theorem body, add vertices, add edges, or claim geometry/physics from the body alone.

name: admitted_permission_channel_registry
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may treat the current admitted permission channel count and records as fixed ledger inputs.
forbidden_use: May not admit new permission channels or infer physical permission from simulator behavior.

name: admitted_information_transport_registry
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may use the single admitted finite information transport as a graph information-transfer primitive.
forbidden_use: May not reinterpret finite information transport as physical transport, energy flow, force, or flux.

name: f0001_return_hub_seam_plateau
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may use the F0001 seam as visible, identifiable, role/cut handled, and pre-role fingerprinted.
forbidden_use: May not treat the seam as generated by a constructive source law.

name: f0001_generator_gap
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may label any F0001 seam behavior as black-boxed at the generator layer.
forbidden_use: May not claim the missing pre-role seam generator has been solved by simulation output.

name: pre_role_seam_fingerprint_surface
allowed_simulator_use: The simulator may expose pre-role seam fingerprints as observables or diagnostic fields.
forbidden_use: May not promote exact fingerprints to constructive causes.
